---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What clinical or ops problem does this solve? Who feels the pain?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see built.

## Which layer does this touch?

- [ ] New agent (plugin or core)
- [ ] New tool
- [ ] Storage layer
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Eval harness
- [ ] Docs

## Is this expressible as a plugin?

Yes / No

> If yes, consider contributing it via `plugins/` — new clinical workflows are easiest to add there without touching core code. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the plugin development guide.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider, and why did you rule it out?

## FHIR / clinical context

Is this tied to a specific FHIR resource or clinical workflow? Link to the HL7 spec if relevant.

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
